domain: Learning, reasoning, decision-making, human-AI interaction, knowledge representation
research_areas: Learning theory — how agents acquire and retain knowledge
Human-AI collaboration patterns and trust dynamics
Metacognition — agents reasoning about their own reasoning
Attention and salience — what makes information governance-relevant?
Memory and compounding — how experience accumulates into wisdom
Conscience as cognitive process — weighted moral attention
curriculum: Foundations of cognitive architecture for AI agents
Belief revision and tetravalent knowledge states
Learning theory: spaced repetition, interleaving, elaboration
